steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says the authors describe how restorative sleep can be for young people. The correct quotation must directly show sleep's restorative power, especially for children.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'humble character of the narrative': says nothing about sleep or its effects on children. ✗
  • Choice B — 'emotional significance of home': addresses home, not sleep. ✗
  • Choice C — 'sleep's healing power for children': "Blessed are the slumbers of the innocent! They are kindlier than balm, and they refresh and gladden the spirit of childhood" directly illustrates restorative sleep for young people. ✓
  • Choice D — 'past injustices': unrelated to sleep or restoration. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
